arts.ttl: Haaland £100m demand prompts Man City panic as Barcelona circle
arts.sum: Erling Haaland wants the door to the Manchester City exit left open for him as Barcelona circle over a potential transfer. Haaland has told City that he wants a release clause placed in any new contract that is set at just £100 million (€120m).

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Man City braced for major transfer changes as FIFA update emerges
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Jamie Gardner, PA Chief Sports Reporter, Bruna Reis)
arts.sum: The European Court of Justice has ruled FIFA's rules on the movement of players between clubs are contrary to European Union law following a case involving former Arsenal man Lassana Diarra

arts.ttl: 'I had a long phone conversation' - Man City get Kevin De Bruyne update as he makes Belgium request
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne will not feature for Manchester City until after the international break - and he has taken a big decision over his Belgium future after making headlines last month.

arts.ttl: ‘Incredible’ – Sunderland ace compared to Manchester City’s Jack Grealish by pundit
arts.sum: Former Sunderland player Marco Gabbiadini has said Chris Rigg reminds him of Manchester City star Jack Grealish. Sunderland’s… The post ‘Incredible’ – Sunderland ace compared to Manchester City’s Jack Grealish by pundit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Neymar, Erling Haaland, Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola will see something very different at the Etihad this weekend thanks to Man City fans
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is into his ninth season at Manchester City but is out of contract at the end of the season and is yet to commit to another deal.

arts.ttl: FIFA confirm 10-day transfer window which majorly impacts Manchester United and Man City
arts.sum: The new transfer window will be used to get around problems created by the Club World Cup, which will take place in the United States next summer

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has found something at Man City to wipe out an Arsenal and Liverpool advantage
arts.sum: Manchester City are battling injury and fitness issues in defence, but those problems have resulted in a settled back line that Pep Guardiola has rarely had the luxury of relying on.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley makes worrying admission on Jude Bellingham, Phil Foden and Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Lee Carsley still insisted that having a wealth of riches in Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham, Manchester City’s Phil Foden and Chelsea’s in-form Cole Palmer is a “nice problem” to have

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola reiterates his love for Barcelona
arts.sum: Comments laid out by Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola on Thursday have turned heads back in his home country of Spain. As much comes after the tactician made use…
